title: alyssum serpyllifolium var. murcicum
intro: Alyssum serpyllifolium var. murcicum, also known as the Dwarf White Alyssum, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb with small white flowers that are highly fragrant and attractive to pollinators. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Alyssum serpyllifolium var. murcicum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties to combat infections. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
